---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Salma"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r }

load("/Users/salma/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofArizona/Desktop/Thesis_grad/scan_MNLR.RData")
head(scan)

```



```{r }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
# Macaque Behavioural Scan Sampling Data
# Requires: train_80, test_20, scan (full dataset)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# ── 1. OVERALL SAMPLE SIZE ───────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("1. OVERALL SAMPLE SIZE\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat(sprintf("Full dataset:    N = %d\n", nrow(scan)))
cat(sprintf("Training set:    N = %d (%.0f%%)\n",
            nrow(train_80), nrow(train_80)/nrow(scan)*100))
cat(sprintf("Test set:        N = %d (%.0f%%)\n\n",
            nrow(test_20),  nrow(test_20)/nrow(scan)*100))

```

```{r}

# ── 2. BEHAVIOURAL FREQUENCY DISTRIBUTION ───────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("2. BEHAVIOURAL FREQUENCY DISTRIBUTION\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

beh_freq <- scan |>
  group_by(Behaviour_Coarse) |>
  summarise(
    N       = n(),
    Pct     = round(n() / nrow(scan) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(N))

cat(sprintf("%-20s  %6s  %6s\n", "Behaviour", "N", "%"))
cat(strrep("-", 36), "\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(beh_freq)) {
  cat(sprintf("%-20s  %6d  %5.1f%%\n",
              beh_freq$Behaviour_Coarse[i],
              beh_freq$N[i],
              beh_freq$Pct[i]))
}
cat(strrep("-", 36), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-20s  %6d  %5.1f%%\n\n", "Total", nrow(scan), 100.0))

```

```{r}

# ── 3. LOCATION DISTRIBUTION ─────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("3. LOCATION DISTRIBUTION\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

loc_freq <- scan |>
  group_by(Location_Coarse) |>
  summarise(
    N   = n(),
    Pct = round(n() / nrow(scan) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(N))

cat(sprintf("%-15s  %6s  %6s\n", "Location", "N", "%"))
cat(strrep("-", 30), "\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(loc_freq)) {
  cat(sprintf("%-15s  %6d  %5.1f%%\n",
              loc_freq$Location_Coarse[i],
              loc_freq$N[i],
              loc_freq$Pct[i]))
}
cat(strrep("-", 30), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-15s  %6d  %5.1f%%\n\n", "Total", nrow(scan), 100.0))

```

```{r}

# ── 4. AGE AND SEX DISTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("4. AGE AND SEX DISTRIBUTION\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

age_freq <- scan |>
  group_by(Age.Class) |>
  summarise(N = n(),
            Pct = round(n()/nrow(scan)*100, 1),
            .groups = "drop")

sex_freq <- scan |>
  group_by(Sex) |>
  summarise(N = n(),
            Pct = round(n()/nrow(scan)*100, 1),
            .groups = "drop")

cat("Age Class:\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(age_freq)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-12s  N=%d  (%.1f%%)\n",
              age_freq$Age.Class[i],
              age_freq$N[i],
              age_freq$Pct[i]))
}

cat("\nSex:\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(sex_freq)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-12s  N=%d  (%.1f%%)\n",
              sex_freq$Sex[i],
              sex_freq$N[i],
              sex_freq$Pct[i]))
}
cat("\n")
```

```{r}

# ── 5. SUBGROUP SAMPLE SIZES (Location x Age x Sex) ──────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("5. SUBGROUP SAMPLE SIZES\n")
cat("   (Location x Age x Sex)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

subgroup <- train_80 |>
  group_by(Location_Coarse, Age.Class, Sex) |>
  summarise(
    N_total = n(),
    N_HD    = sum(Behaviour_Coarse == "Human Directed"),
    Pct_HD  = round(sum(Behaviour_Coarse == "Human Directed") / n() * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(Location_Coarse, Age.Class, Sex)

cat(sprintf("%-14s  %-10s  %-8s  %7s  %6s  %7s\n",
            "Location", "Age", "Sex",
            "N_total", "N_HD", "% HD"))
cat(strrep("-", 58), "\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(subgroup)) {
  cat(sprintf("%-14s  %-10s  %-8s  %7d  %6d  %6.1f%%\n",
              subgroup$Location_Coarse[i],
              subgroup$Age.Class[i],
              subgroup$Sex[i],
              subgroup$N_total[i],
              subgroup$N_HD[i],
              subgroup$Pct_HD[i]))
}
cat(strrep("-", 58), "\n\n")

# Flag sparse subgroups
sparse <- subgroup |> filter(N_total < 20)
if (nrow(sparse) > 0) {
  cat("Sparse subgroups (N < 20):\n")
  for (i in 1:nrow(sparse)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s %s %s: N=%d\n",
                sparse$Location_Coarse[i],
                sparse$Age.Class[i],
                sparse$Sex[i],
                sparse$N_total[i]))
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```

```{r}

# ── 6. BEHAVIOUR BY LOCATION ─────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("6. BEHAVIOUR BY LOCATION\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

beh_by_loc <- scan |>
  group_by(Location_Coarse, Behaviour_Coarse) |>
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(Location_Coarse) |>
  mutate(Pct = round(N / sum(N) * 100, 1)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  pivot_wider(names_from  = Location_Coarse,
              values_from = c(N, Pct),
              values_fill = 0)

cat("Percentage of each behaviour by location:\n\n")

beh_loc_pct <- scan |>
  group_by(Location_Coarse, Behaviour_Coarse) |>
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(Location_Coarse) |>
  mutate(Pct = round(N / sum(N) * 100, 1)) |>
  ungroup()

# Print as wide table
locs <- c("Forest", "Roadside", "RoadsideVeg")
behs <- c("Rest", "Move", "Feed/Forage",
          "Socio-Sexual", "Human Directed")

cat(sprintf("%-18s", "Behaviour"))
for (l in locs) cat(sprintf("  %12s", l))
cat("\n")
cat(strrep("-", 18 + 14 * length(locs)), "\n")

for (b in behs) {
  cat(sprintf("%-18s", b))
  for (l in locs) {
    val <- beh_loc_pct |>
      filter(Location_Coarse == l,
             Behaviour_Coarse == b) |>
      pull(Pct)
    val <- ifelse(length(val) == 0, 0, val)
    cat(sprintf("  %11.1f%%", val))
  }
  cat("\n")
}
cat("\n")

```

```{r}

# ── 7. BEHAVIOUR BY AGE AND SEX ──────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("7. BEHAVIOUR BY AGE AND SEX\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

beh_agesex <- scan |>
  group_by(Age.Class, Sex, Behaviour_Coarse) |>
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(Age.Class, Sex) |>
  mutate(Pct = round(N / sum(N) * 100, 1)) |>
  ungroup()

groups <- list(
  c("Adult",    "Female"),
  c("Adult",    "Male"),
  c("Subadult", "Female"),
  c("Subadult", "Male")
)

cat(sprintf("%-18s", "Behaviour"))
for (g in groups) {
  cat(sprintf("  %14s", paste(g[1], g[2])))
}
cat("\n")
cat(strrep("-", 18 + 16 * length(groups)), "\n")

for (b in behs) {
  cat(sprintf("%-18s", b))
  for (g in groups) {
    val <- beh_agesex |>
      filter(Age.Class == g[1],
             Sex == g[2],
             Behaviour_Coarse == b) |>
      pull(Pct)
    val <- ifelse(length(val) == 0, 0, val)
    cat(sprintf("  %13.1f%%", val))
  }
  cat("\n")
}
cat("\n")

```

```{r}

# ── 8. TIME OF DAY DISTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("8. TIME OF DAY DISTRIBUTION\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

hour_dist <- scan |>
  mutate(hour = as.numeric(format(POSIX, "%H"))) |>
  group_by(hour) |>
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(hour)

cat(sprintf("%-8s  %6s  %6s\n", "Hour", "N", "%"))
cat(strrep("-", 24), "\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(hour_dist)) {
  cat(sprintf("%02d:00     %6d  %5.1f%%\n",
              hour_dist$hour[i],
              hour_dist$N[i],
              hour_dist$N[i] / nrow(scan) * 100))
}
cat("\n")
```

```{r}

# ── 9. SAVE TABLES AS CSV ─────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("9. SAVING TABLES\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

write.csv(beh_freq,  "table1_behaviour_frequency.csv",  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(subgroup,  "table2_subgroup_sizes.csv",        row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(beh_loc_pct, "table3_behaviour_by_location.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(beh_agesex,  "table4_behaviour_by_agesex.csv",   row.names = FALSE)

cat("Saved:\n")
cat("  table1_behaviour_frequency.csv\n")
cat("  table2_subgroup_sizes.csv\n")
cat("  table3_behaviour_by_location.csv\n")
cat("  table4_behaviour_by_agesex.csv\n\n")

# ── 10. DESCRIPTIVE PLOTS ─────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("10. GENERATING DESCRIPTIVE PLOTS\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

theme_desc <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.4),
      strip.text       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey97", color = "grey88"),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey30"),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey20"),
      plot.title       = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "grey10"),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey45"),
      plot.margin      = unit(c(10, 10, 8, 10), "pt")
    )
}

beh_colors <- c(
  "Rest"           = "#378ADD",
  "Move"           = "#1D9E75",
  "Feed/Forage"    = "#D85A30",
  "Socio-Sexual"   = "#7F77DD",
  "Human Directed" = "#E24B4A"
)

# Plot 1 — Behaviour frequency bar chart
p1 <- ggplot(beh_freq,
             aes(x    = reorder(Behaviour_Coarse, N),
                 y    = N,
                 fill = Behaviour_Coarse)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(N, " (", Pct, "%)")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.2, color = "grey25") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = beh_colors, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.20))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title    = "Behavioural frequency distribution",
    subtitle = sprintf("N = %d total observations", nrow(scan)),
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_desc()

ggsave("desc_behaviour_frequency.png",
       plot = p1, width = 8, height = 5,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("Saved: desc_behaviour_frequency.png\n")

# Plot 2 — Behaviour by location (stacked bar)
p2 <- ggplot(beh_loc_pct,
             aes(x    = Location_Coarse,
                 y    = Pct,
                 fill = Behaviour_Coarse)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Pct >= 5,
                               paste0(Pct, "%"), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.0, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = beh_colors, name = "Behaviour") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Behavioural composition by location",
    subtitle = "Human Directed rises dramatically at Roadside",
    x        = "Location",
    y        = "Percentage of observations"
  ) +
  theme_desc()

ggsave("desc_behaviour_by_location.png",
       plot = p2, width = 9, height = 6,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("Saved: desc_behaviour_by_location.png\n")

# Plot 3 — Behaviour by Age x Sex (faceted)
beh_agesex_plot <- scan |>
  group_by(Age.Class, Sex, Behaviour_Coarse) |>
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(Age.Class, Sex) |>
  mutate(
    Pct   = N / sum(N) * 100,
    Group = paste(Age.Class, Sex)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(Group = factor(Group,
                        levels = c("Adult Female", "Adult Male",
                                   "Subadult Female", "Subadult Male")))

p3 <- ggplot(beh_agesex_plot,
             aes(x    = Behaviour_Coarse,
                 y    = Pct,
                 fill = Behaviour_Coarse)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(Pct, 0), "%")),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 2.8, color = "grey25") +
  facet_wrap(~ Group, nrow = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = beh_colors, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title    = "Behavioural composition by Age and Sex",
    subtitle = "Human Directed varies across demographic groups",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Percentage of observations"
  ) +
  theme_desc() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, size = 8))

ggsave("desc_behaviour_by_agesex.png",
       plot = p3, width = 11, height = 8,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("Saved: desc_behaviour_by_agesex.png\n")

# Plot 4 — Subgroup sample sizes heatmap
subgroup_plot <- subgroup |>
  mutate(
    Group    = paste(Age.Class, Sex),
    Sparse   = N_total < 20,
    Label    = paste0("n=", N_total)
  )

p4 <- ggplot(subgroup_plot,
             aes(x    = Location_Coarse,
                 y    = paste(Age.Class, Sex),
                 fill = N_total)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Label),
            size     = 3.5,
            fontface = ifelse(subgroup_plot$Sparse, "bold", "plain"),
            color    = ifelse(subgroup_plot$N_total > 200,
                              "white", "grey15")) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("#FAEEDA", "#85B7EB", "#185FA5"),
    values = c(0, 0.3, 1),
    name   = "N observations"
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Subgroup sample sizes (training set)",
    subtitle = "Bold = sparse subgroups (N < 20)",
    x        = "Location",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_desc()

ggsave("desc_subgroup_sizes.png",
       plot = p4, width = 8, height = 5,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("Saved: desc_subgroup_sizes.png\n")

# Plot 5 — Time of day distribution
hour_beh <- scan |>
  mutate(hour = as.numeric(format(POSIX, "%H"))) |>
  group_by(hour, Behaviour_Coarse) |>
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(hour) |>
  mutate(Pct = N / sum(N) * 100) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(Behaviour_Coarse = factor(Behaviour_Coarse,
                                   levels = names(beh_colors)))

p5 <- ggplot(hour_beh,
             aes(x    = hour,
                 y    = Pct,
                 fill = Behaviour_Coarse)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.85, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = beh_colors, name = "Behaviour") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18),
    labels = c("08:00","10:00","12:00",
               "14:00","16:00","18:00")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Behavioural composition across time of day",
    subtitle = "Stacked bars show proportion of each behaviour at each hour",
    x        = "Hour of day",
    y        = "Percentage of observations"
  ) +
  theme_desc()

ggsave("desc_time_of_day.png",
       plot = p5, width = 10, height = 6,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("Saved: desc_time_of_day.png\n\n")

cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("All descriptive statistics complete.\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════\n")

```


```{r}
```

```{r}
```


```{r}
```

```{r}
```
